title: pelargonium × litigiosum
intro: Pelargonium × litigiosum, also known as the litigiosum, is a hybrid species within the Pelargonium genus, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as geraniums. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to soothe sore throats and calm digestive issues due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The litigiosum has been used to promote overall health and wellbeing, with benefits including the reduction of fever and the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the litigiosum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, providing a natural and effective way to harness its medicinal properties.
